patterns_discovered.description: Uses client.aio.models.generate_content() for non-blocking API calls
Dynamically adds response_json_schema and response_mime_type only when response_schema is provided
Follows established LLMProvider abstract pattern with required method implementations
Full type annotation of parameters and return values

gotchas_discovered.description: Setting response_json_schema requires also setting response_mime_type='application/json' - both are required together
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Both config keys set together in same block

gotchas_discovered.description: Direct access to response.text assumes this property always exists and is available
API calls could fail but no try/except or error handling implemented
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Relies on caller to handle exceptions

approach_outcome.implementation_approach: Direct implementation of Pattern 2 specification using google-genai library async interface
approach_outcome.specification_compliance: Full - uses specified model (gemini-2.5-flash), async generation, structured output via response_json_schema
approach_outcome.code_quality: Good - proper structure, type hints, clean method implementation

recommendations.recommendation: Add try/except error handling around client.aio.models.generate_content() call
recommendations.rationale: API calls can fail; should handle timeouts, rate limits, and malformed responses

recommendations.recommendation: Add type guard or assertion for response.text before returning
recommendations.rationale: Ensures response object has expected structure before accessing text property

recommendations.recommendation: Add docstring example to generate() method showing schema usage
recommendations.rationale: Helps users understand how to pass response_schema parameter

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding retry logic with exponential backoff for transient failures
recommendations.rationale: Common pattern for LLM API integrations to handle rate limiting
